name: NuGet JIT Hooking ASP.NET Identity Stealer
description: Malicious NuGet packages install JIT compiler hooks to decrypt payloads invisible to static analysis. Deploys local proxy, exfiltrates ASP.NET Identity data, and injects authorization backdoors. 4,500+ downloads.

affected_packages.name: NCryptYo
affected_packages.note: Typosquat of NCrypto. JIT hook installer.

remediation: Remove NCryptYo, DOMOAuth2_, IRAOAuth2.0, SimpleWriter_ packages
Audit ASP.NET Identity permission data for unauthorized roles
